'''salate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kerchunk|kerchunk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kerchunk|kerchunk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| salate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:salate|salate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:salatesher|salatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salatesherĂ«m|salatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:salatero|salatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:salateshĂ«|salateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salateshĂ«m|salateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisalatero|gokisalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisalateshĂ«|gokisalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalateshĂ«m|gokisalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosalankerom|gosalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosalankeshĂ«|gosalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalankeshĂ«m|gosalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosalankeya|gosalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:salaterom|salaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salatemu|salatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:salateya|salateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisalaterom|gokisalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalatemu|gokisalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisalateya|gokisalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:salalate|salalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:salalatesher|salalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salalatesherĂ«m|salalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:salalatero|salalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:salalateshĂ«|salalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salalateshĂ«m|salalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisalalatero|gokisalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisalalateshĂ«|gokisalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalalateshĂ«m|gokisalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosalalankerom|gosalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosalalankeshĂ«|gosalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalalankeshĂ«m|gosalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosalalankeya|gosalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:salalaterom|salalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salalatemu|salalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:salalateya|salalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisalalaterom|gokisalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalalatemu|gokisalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisalalateya|gokisalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠlĂŠte|sĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠlĂŠtesher|sĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠlĂŠtero|sĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠlĂŠtero|gokisĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠlĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠlĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠlĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠlĂŠterom|sĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠlĂŠtemu|sĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠlĂŠteya|sĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠlĂŠterom|gokisĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠlĂŠteya|gokisĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:saflafte|saflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:saflaftesher|saflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saflaftesherĂ«m|saflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:saflaftero|saflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:saflafteshĂ«|saflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saflafteshĂ«m|saflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisaflaftero|gokisaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisaflafteshĂ«|gokisaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisaflafteshĂ«m|gokisaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosaflafnkerom|gosaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosaflafnkeshĂ«|gosaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosaflafnkeshĂ«m|gosaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosaflafnkeya|gosaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:saflafterom|saflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saflaftemu|saflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:saflafteya|saflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisaflafterom|gokisaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisaflaftemu|gokisaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisaflafteya|gokisaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
